overview.description: The AMG GW&K Muni Income ETF (MUNX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF aiming to provide current income, exempt from federal income tax, by investing in municipal bonds. The fund targets intermediate-term, but has the flexibility to invest across sectors, duration, and credit quality. MUNX was launched on Oct 29, 2025 and is issued by AMG Funds.
